operator_tests.question: Can user identify Top 3 fixes in 10 seconds?
operator_tests.evidence: Top 3 panel is the third Overview panel with explicit '#1 / #2 / #3' headers and registry-backed badges. Bullets are short.

operator_tests.question: Can user identify core system flow in 5 seconds?
operator_tests.evidence: Simple 3LS Flowchart panel renders core canonical_loop as 'AEX → PQX → EVL → TPA → CDE → SEL'.

operator_tests.question: Can user identify root cause in 15 seconds?
operator_tests.evidence: Explain System State panel: 'root cause: <system_id> (<taxonomy>)' on a single line.

operator_tests.question: Can user identify propagation path in 15 seconds?
operator_tests.evidence: Explain System State panel: 'propagation: A → B → C' on a single line; full failure_path used.

operator_tests.question: Can user tell if data is stale/missing?
operator_tests.evidence: Trust Pulse last_recompute, top3-warning, queue-warning, flow-warning + Diagnostics replay panel show explicit timestamps.

operator_tests.question: Can user tell whether a node is registry-backed?
operator_tests.evidence: Top 3 cards carry 'registry-backed' or 'text-only · not a registry system' badges; graph rejects non-registry nodes outright.

operator_tests.question: Can user avoid confusing roadmap label with system node?
operator_tests.evidence: Bundle ids (TLS-BND-*) appear only in queue cards as text labels; never as graph nodes. Decision Layer view is registry-only.

operator_tests.question: Can user debug on mobile?
operator_tests.evidence: page.tsx uses overflow-x-hidden, sticky tabs with overflow-x-auto, smaller padding at small breakpoints. Inspector and Diagnostics panels still render.

operator_tests.question: Can user find full details without cluttering overview?
operator_tests.evidence: Diagnostics, Sources, Raw Artifacts, Roadmap, Prioritization tabs preserve all detail behind a tab click.

operator_tests.question: Can user tell what changed since last recompute?
operator_tests.evidence: DiffSinceLastRecompute (left rail of Graph tab) plus Diagnostics replay panel shows graph + priority generated_at.

remaining_risks: OPER-08 has not been verified against a real iPhone-width browser session in this phase; mitigation pinned via responsive utilities and is acceptable for a first PR; future bundle should add an explicit Fit / Scroll toggle and an end-to-end mobile screenshot.
